root_cause: Container runtime timed out while starting the container
evidence: Kubelet failure events explicitly show container start timeout markers
Container remains in a waiting startup state while timeout events repeat
Dominant timeout error: Error: failed to create containerd task: context deadline exceeded while starting container "worker"

causes.message: Kubelet requested that the runtime start the container
Container runtime exceeded the allowed time while starting the container
Pod remains stuck before container startup completes

pod:payments-worker-5dff7d7bb9-k4sn2: Pod is stuck because container startup timed out in the runtime

likely_causes: containerd or CRI-O is overloaded or unhealthy on the node
Node resource pressure is delaying runtime startup beyond kubelet deadlines
Security or storage hooks in the start path are blocking container launch
suggested_checks: Check kubelet logs for start timeout or deadline exceeded errors
Verify containerd or CRI-O health on the node
Inspect node resource pressure and runtime shim behavior
